The passage uses precise instructional language about variable scoping and masking a built-in, with an explanatory tone typical of technical documentation or AI-generated guidance. There are no clear signs of personal authorship or informal expression, so it is more likely AI-generated.
[[ ## is_ai ## ]]
True
[[ ## completed ## ]]
